2604.10126.title: MR-Coupler: Automated Metamorphic Test Generation via Functional Coupling Analysis
2604.10126.paper_summary: Metamorphic testing (MT) is a widely recognized technique for alleviating the oracle problem in software testing. However, its adoption is hindered by the difficulty of constructing effective metamorphic relations (MRs), which often require domain-specific or hard-to-obtain knowledge. In this work, we propose a novel approach that leverages the functional coupling between methods, which is readily available in source code, to automatically construct MRs and generate metamorphic test cases (MTCs). Our technique, MR-Coupler, identifies functionally coupled method pairs, employs large language models to generate candidate MTCs, and validates them through test amplification and mutation analysis. In particular, we leverage three functional coupling features to avoid expensive enumeration of possible method pairs, and a novel validation mechanism to reduce false alarms. Our evaluation of MR-Coupler on 100 human-written MTCs and 50 real-world bugs shows that it generates valid MTCs for over 90% of tasks, improves valid MTC generation by 64.90%, and reduces false alarms by 36.56% compared to baselines. Furthermore, the MTCs generated by MR-Coupler detect 44% of the real bugs. Our results highlight the effectiveness of leveraging functional coupling for automated MR construction and the potential of MR-Coupler to facilitate the adoption of MT in practice. We also released the tool and experimental data to support future research.
2604.10126.paper_summary_zh: 變形測試（MT）是一種廣泛認可的技術，用於緩解軟體測試中的神諭問題。<lb/>然而，其採用受到構建有效變形關係（MRs）難度的阻礙，這通常需要特定領域或難以獲得的知識。<lb/>在這項工作中，我們提出了一種新穎的方法，利用源代碼中可用的功能耦合來自動構建MRs並生成變形測試案例（MTCs）。<lb/>我們的技術MR-Coupler識別功能耦合的函數對，利用大型語言模型生成候選MTCs，並通過測試擴增和突變分析進行驗證。<lb/>特別是，我們利用三個功能耦合特徵來避免昂貴的可能函數對的枚舉，以及一種新穎的驗證機制來減少誤報。<lb/>我們對MR-Coupler在100個人類編寫的MTCs和50個真實世界錯誤的評估顯示，它為超過90%的任務生成有效的MTCs，並將有效MTC生成提高了64.90%，與基準相比，減少了36.56%的誤報。<lb/>此外，MR-Coupler生成的MTCs檢測到44%的真實錯誤。<lb/>我們的結果突顯了利用功能耦合進行自動MR構建的有效性，以及MR-Coupler促進MT在實踐中採用的潛力。<lb/>我們還發布了該工具和實驗數據以支持未來的研究。
2604.10126.author: Congying Xu et.al.
2604.10126.authors: Congying Xu, Hengcheng Zhu, Songqiang Chen, Jiarong Wu, Valerio Terragni, Shing-Chi Cheung
